original_prompt: 给这个和田玉手串做一张淘宝主图，要求多添加一点元素充实画面
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry scene, Premium Oriental Commercial Photography style. [Subject Lock]: A minimalist circular array of glossy, pale green spherical beads with a translucent, jade-like finish located in the center. 
[Props]: The bracelet rests on a textured white sandstone rock or a piece of aged driftwood. Surrounded by delicate elements like a few scattered fresh bamboo leaves, a small porcelain tea cup, or white pebbles to add richness without clutter.
[Background]: Soft gradient of misty mountain green and white, or a blurred traditional Chinese window lattice pattern, evoking a Zen atmosphere.
Lighting is Soft and Diffused, emphasizing the 'watery' translucency and glossy cat's-eye reflections of the jade beads."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard.
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “Genuine Hetian Jade”. Position: Top Left Negative Space. Style: 3D Bold Serif font with a gold metallic texture. Color: Deep Emerald Green.
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “Moist & Translucent”. Style: Elegant handwritten script, smaller than main title.
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “Master Craftsmanship”. Style: Frosted Glass Bar with a thin gold border.
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “Certified Authentic”. Style: Translucent Glass Badge with Gold Rim."
layout_logic: Suggestions: 1. Keep the bracelet in the lower-center to allow ample 'breathing room' at the top for the main title. 2. Use the props (bamboo/stones) to frame the product, leading the eye towards the center. 3. Ensure the text color (Deep Green/Gold) contrasts well against the lighter, misty background.
